3 = Both DIB and ESRD 
Null/missing = not Medicare enrolled 

COMMENT: CCW obtains this directly from the MBSF ENTLMT_RSN_ORIG variable. 

The current reason for entitlement can differ from the original reason that a beneficiary qualified for 
Medicare (reference the MDCR_CREC variable in MMLEADS). 

CMS obtains this information from the Social Security Administration (SSA) and Railroad Retirement 
Board (RRB) record systems.
